findings.description: The source explicitly calls out `ValidationContext.getMessage()` as the standard way to obtain the property display name for `addResultMessage`'s optional parameter. This method name is absent from s2's hints, reducing discoverability for queries about error message construction.
findings.source_evidence: 「通常エラーメッセージの置き換え文字にプロパティ名を挿入することが多い。このような場合、サンプルのように ValidationContext の getMessage メソッドで取得した Message をオプションパラメータとして設定しておく。」 and the code `context.getMessage(propertyMessageId)` used three times in the validate method.

findings.description: `annotationType` is missing from s4's hints. The source code for the anonymous SampleCheck implementation requires overriding `annotationType()` — it is the only non-business method in the anonymous class and a mandatory part of the DirectCallableValidator pattern.
